title: Polymicrogyria: epidemiology, imaging, and clinical aspects in a population-based cohort
content: S-EPMC10443657 PMC10443657 Polymicrogyria: epidemiology, imaging, and clinical aspects in a population-based cohort Abstract Polymicrogyria is estimated to be one of the most common brain malformations, accounting for ∼16% of malformations of cortical development. However, the prevalence
